Erigaisi Arjun (2751) - Van Foreest, Jorden (2735)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.05.05
D11 Queen's Gambit Declined Slav, 3.Nf3

1.d4 d5 2.c4 c6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Qb3 h6 5.Nc3 dxc4 6.Qxc4 Bf5 7.Ne5 e6 8.a4 Nbd7 9.Nxd7 Qxd7 10.f3 a5 11.e4 Bh7 12.Bf4 Bb4 13.Be2 O-O 14.O-O Kh8 15.Rfd1 Ng8 16.Na2 Bd6 17.Bxd6 Qxd6 18.b4 axb4 19.Qxb4 Qxb4 20.Nxb4 Rfd8 21.Kf2 f5 22.Ke3 fxe4 23.fxe4 Nf6 24.Bf3 g5 25.h3 e5 26.dxe5 Nd7 27.e6 Nc5 28.e7 Re8 29.Rac1 Rxa4 30.Rd8
